pi_items.metadata_value: genuine architectural 2-car garage floor plan with multiple named layers, wall bracing notes, dimension annotations, and construction text
pi_items.verified_value: Architectural floor plan with 24 layers, 967 entities including 89 TEXT annotations, 63 DIMENSION entities, 624 LINE entities, 124 LWPOLYLINE entities, plus arcs, circles, hatches, and leaders. Named layers include A-WALL, A-GARAGE-DOOR, S-STEM-WALL, S-FOOTER, A-HEADER, A-FIXTURE, etc. Specific floor plan subject (2-car garage) cannot be independently verified.

pi_items.verified_value: File is a real DXF file from jscad/sample-files (originally from bjnortier/dxf-parser project). Contains detailed architectural drawing with realistic layer names, dimensions, and construction elements.

privileged_info_summary: The floorplan.dxf file is a real, publicly available architectural drawing (1,117,143 bytes) downloaded from jscad/sample-files GitHub repository. It contains 24 named layers with architectural naming conventions (A-WALL, A-GARAGE-DOOR, S-STEM-WALL, etc.), 967 total entities including 89 text annotations, 63 dimension entities, 624 lines, and 124 polylines. The file is in AutoCAD 2000 DXF format (AC1018). The setup scripts claim it comes from an 'Apache-licensed' project, but GitHub records show jscad/sample-files has no explicit license, and the main jscad/OpenJSCAD.org project uses MIT License, not Apache. The file was originally saved by user 'hanna' and contains complex architectural details consistent with a floor plan drawing.
